title: rosa alpina var. lagenaria
intro: Rosa alpina var. lagenaria, also known as the Alpine rose or Lagenaria rose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rosa alpina var. lagenaria include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and salves to treat skin conditions.
